response.justification: Although the candidate is a highly experienced software engineer with strong architectural and agile skills, their background is heavily focused on web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) and DLang. They lack the recent, deep C++ expertise, multi-threading background, and industrial cybersecurity (IEC 62443) experience required for this core C++ manufacturing role.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong focus on agile methodologies, TDD, and CI/CD.
Possesses advantageous skills listed in the job description, such as React, Node.js, and REST API development.
Demonstrated leadership and architectural capabilities, including mentoring and open-source project maintenance.
concerns: Lacks recent and extensive professional C++ experience, having only used it briefly in 2014-2015.
No demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL).
Missing background in industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA) and message-broker-based C++ applications.
